first_run.rationale: The score is identical (3/10), and the core reasoning for the low score is consistent across both evaluations: a fundamental lack of experience in experimentation, A/B testing, and metrics platforms. Minor variations in the wording of strengths and the factual re-association of an acquired employer (Sociomantic to its parent Dunnhumby) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not change the substantive assessment.
